title: Notebook
description: A day-by-day log of our team's progress, challenges, and findings.

sections.text: The team convened for the first time to brainstorm project ideas. We settled on the theme of bioremediation after discussing local environmental issues. Initial literature review began.
The dry lab team began designing the initial set of BioBrick parts. The wet lab team started preparing standard lab stocks and media. Safety forms were completed and submitted.
